task_objective: Refactor Parallel Mode to be Backend-Safe
design_decisions: Replaced the parallel safety blacklist with an empty allowlist, effectively disabling the current unsafe 'shared-connection' parallel mode for all backends. Moved the safety check to the beginning of Profiler.run() to prevent unnecessary ThreadPoolExecutor initialization. All backends now trigger a sequential fallback with a warning.
results: Unit tests verify that all backends (Pandas, Postgres, DuckDB, etc.) now correctly trigger a sequential fallback for safety. All 133 tests passed.
